candidate.problem: local_improvement copied the first sentence of the original prompt into revised_prompt.
candidate.risk: Repair JSON and local improve output could still echo risky prompt text through the deterministic recommendation, even when the prompt record itself was redacted.
candidate.decision: Derive the local recommendation goal line from redacted prompt text.

red.evidence: The new test failed because revised_prompt still contained the raw synthetic token.

green.evidence: The focused test passed after local_improvement used redacted prompt text for the copied goal line.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 42 Rust library tests passed, 15 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.

staged_checks.evidence: gitleaks scanned staged code and found no leaks.
